title: Local variables should be initialized immediately
description: Objects should be initialized as soon as they are declared. It will be implicitly the case if they have a default constructor, as this latter will be called, but otherwise the initialization must be explicit. Even when an object has a default constructor, it may be interesting to use another more relevant constructor to directly give the the object its right value.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: Local variables should be initialized immediately
